name: Nasi Dagang Mak Yah
description: Mak Yah has been ladling out her family's Kelantan-style nasi dagang for over thirty years. The recipe — coconut-steamed rice paired with a slow-simmered tuna curry — has not changed since her mother first taught her at the kampung kitchen. Open mornings only, until the pot runs dry.
tagline: Coconut rice & tuna curry, the Kelantan way

products.name: Nasi Dagang Ikan Tongkol
products.description: Coconut-milk rice with spiced tuna curry, served with pickled vegetables and a soft-boiled egg.

products.name: Teh Tarik
products.description: The classic pulled milk tea — strong, frothy, and sweet just the way the locals like it.

products.name: Roti Jala with Kari
products.description: Lacy net-pancakes folded over a fragrant chicken curry dip — a Kelantan tea-time favourite.

products.name: Kuih Lapis
products.description: Steamed nine-layer rice flour cake in pastel pinks and greens. Peel it apart layer by layer.

products.name: Sirap Bandung
products.description: Rose syrup stirred into evaporated milk — pink, cold, and unmistakably nostalgic.

name: Coconut Shake Pakcik
description: Pakcik Hamid runs the beachfront's most beloved shake cart, blending freshly cracked coconuts with vanilla ice cream and a splash of evaporated milk. Watch the sunset over Bachok with one of his signature pours in hand.

products.name: Original Coconut Shake
products.description: Fresh young coconut flesh and water blended with vanilla ice cream and crushed ice.

products.name: Pandan Coconut Shake
products.description: The original shake infused with fragrant pandan leaf syrup — green, silky, aromatic.

products.name: Cendol Coconut Shake
products.description: A dessert in a cup — coconut shake layered with cendol jelly, gula melaka, and red beans.

products.name: Mineral Water
products.description: Chilled 500ml bottled mineral water. Sometimes you just need water.

name: Batik Crafts Aishah
description: Aishah's family workshop in Cherating produces both hand-block (batik cap) and hand-drawn (batik tulis) textiles. Her motifs draw from the coastline — turtles, hibiscus, and waves — celebrating Pahang's marine conservation heritage.

products.name: Batik Selendang
products.description: Lightweight hand-painted shawl in soft coastal palettes. Perfect as a scarf or wrap.

products.name: Batik Sarung
products.description: Traditional wrap-skirt length of batik tulis with hibiscus and wave motifs.

products.name: Batik Shirt — Mens
products.description: Tailored short-sleeve mens shirt in hand-block batik. Cool cotton, statement print.

products.name: Batik Dress — Womens
products.description: Flowing A-line dress in batik tulis. Resort-ready, beautifully drapey.

products.name: Batik Pouch
products.description: Zip pouch lined with cotton — handy for cosmetics, cards, or beach essentials.

products.name: Mini Wall Hanging
products.description: Framed mini batik panel featuring a hand-drawn sea turtle motif. A keepsake of the coast.

name: Beach Gear & Rentals
description: Razali stocks the things every island guest forgets to pack — snorkel sets, paddleboards, beach chairs, umbrellas, and reef shoes. Friendly day-rates, sand-tested gear, and a free tide chart with every rental.

products.name: Snorkel Set — Day Rental
products.description: Mask, snorkel, and fins in adult sizes. Perfect for Pangkor's reef pools.

products.name: Beach Chair — Day Rental
products.description: Folding hardwood beach chair with reclining back. Comfortable for all-day lounging.

products.name: Beach Umbrella — Day Rental
products.description: Large UPF-50 beach umbrella with sand anchor. Shade for two.

products.name: Stand-Up Paddleboard — Hourly
products.description: Inflatable SUP with paddle and ankle leash. Beginner-friendly stability.

products.name: Reef Shoes — Pair
products.description: Protective neoprene reef shoes. Various sizes — keeps your feet safe on coral and rocks.
